Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Statistics Coaching Staff Camp Form Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball

23 Chase Allen

  • Position F
  • Height 6-7
  • Weight 220
  • Class Freshman
  • Hometown Rome, Ga.
  • Prev School Model H.S.
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

2025-26: Played in two games … Secured a rebound against Catawba … Grabbed four boards in the win over VUL.

High School: Attended Model H.S. … Two-time GACA and AJC all-state selection … Guided his team to a pair of region championships … Two-time first-team all-region honoree … Player of the Year as a senior … GACA all-star selection … Averaged 17 points, 11 rebounds and four assists a game as a senior … Tallied 17 points, 12 boards and three assists per contest his junior campaign.  

Personal: Chase Alexander Allen was born in Norfolk, Va. … Son of Reushaun Jones and Davorise Allen … Majoring in business administration – finance.
